name: Corpse Candle
description: A floating pale light that drifts toward places where someone will soon die or has recently died. It follows death. It does not cause it.

traits.name: Deathsense
traits.description: The Corpse Candle knows when a creature within 1 mile will die within 24 hours. It drifts toward that creature and hovers near them. It does not know the cause. It just knows the timing.

traits.name: Untouchable
traits.description: The Corpse Candle cannot be harmed, moved, or interacted with physically. Attacks pass through it. It cannot be dispelled.

traits.name: Cultural Terror
traits.description: Any NPC who sees the Corpse Candle near a specific person reacts with immediate terror and avoidance of that person. They will not speak to the marked person, do business with them, or allow them into their home.

traits.name: Prediction Not Curse
traits.description: The Corpse Candle predicts death — it does not cause it. The marked creature can survive if the cause of death is identified and prevented. The Candle fades when the predicted death no longer will occur.

lore: It knows. That is all it does. It knows and it follows the knowing. It has no malice. It has no mercy. It is simply accurate.

campaignUse.session0: Appears at midnight drifting through a window to hover near one party member. The room goes silent. Even Vladislav watches it. The DM knows whose death it predicts. The party does not.
campaignUse.session14: Appears again outside Čachtice. Same light. Same silence. The party now knows what it means. The question is the same as before — whose death and can it be prevented.
campaignUse.mechanicalNote: Pure atmosphere and story tool. No stats needed in practice. DM decides what death it is predicting and whether the party can prevent it.
